notes:
FIXED
- .hicks/ vault structure — system data no longer pollutes vault root
- Note index page written to .hicks/notes.md instead of vault root
- Database paths use .hicks/database/ prefix
- Threads/ directory removed from note file sync
- All system page types use .hicks/ prefix (topics, activity, reports)
- Profile and daily-log paths use .hicks/ prefix
- Tags removed from wiki page viewer metadata line

IMPROVED
- White logo in update modal (instead of sage)
- Settings release notes now match modal styling (FIXED/IMPROVED/NEW sections)
- Badge format: v0.1.27 (+1) in bottom-right corner
- Removed "Read the changelog" link from settings
